    S

    scanner - Variable in class whistapp.ui.CLI
     
    ScoreGame - Class in whistapp.domain.game
     
    ScoreGame() - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.game.ScoreGame
    A no-arg constructor for the ScoreGame class.
    ScoreGame(ArrayList) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.game.ScoreGame
    A constructor immediately incorporating the players into the game.
    ScoreGameCLI - Class in whistapp.ui
    CLI for tracking the score of a physical Whist game.
    ScoreGameCLI(Controller) - Constructor for class whistapp.ui.ScoreGameCLI
    Create a ScoreGameCLI bound to the given controller.
    ScoreRound - Class in whistapp.domain.round
     
    ScoreRound(ArrayList) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.round.ScoreRound
     
    setAllScores(int) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method to set the scores of all players to a given amount.
    setFinalBid(Bid) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    Sets the final bid.
    setFinalBid(BidType, ArrayList, boolean) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    A method for setting the final bid in this round.
    setHighestBid(BidType) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A setter for the highest bid in this round.
    setName(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A simple setter for setting of the name of this player.
    setReshuffledState(boolean) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Registers the reshuffle state during the bidding stage of a round.
    setReshuffledState(boolean) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Set whether the deck was reshuffled this round.
    setReshuffledState(boolean) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.ScoreGame
    Set whether the deck was reshuffled this round.
    setScore(int) - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A simple setter for setting the score of this player.
    setWasFirstTry(boolean) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    Set whether this round was played on the first try.
    SEVEN - Enum constant in enum class whistapp.domain.cards.Value
     
    show() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Start the interactive score-tracking loop.
    show() - Method in class whistapp.ui.MainMenuCLI
     
    showAllRounds() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
     
    showAllRounds() - Method in class whistapp.ui.PlayGameCLI
    Drive the round loop: repeatedly play a round until the user indicates they do not want to play another round.
    showAllRounds() - Method in class whistapp.ui.ScoreGameCLI
    Drive the round loop: repeatedly play a round until the user indicates they do not want to play another round.
    showGameResults() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Display the final game results.
    showHand() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Display the hand of the active player.
    showHand(String, String[]) - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Display a given hand.
    showIntro() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
     
    showIntro() - Method in class whistapp.ui.PlayGameCLI
    Clear the screen and show a short introduction describing this CLI mode.
    showIntro() - Method in class whistapp.ui.ScoreGameCLI
    Clear the screen and show a short introduction describing this CLI mode.
    showLastDealtCard() - Method in class whistapp.ui.PlayGameCLI
    Shows the last dealt card, which is always dealt face up and determines the trump for some bids.
    showOpenMiserieHands() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Displays the hands of the open msierie players.
    showPlayerPoints() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Display the current scores of every player
    showRound() - Method in class whistapp.ui.ScoreGameCLI
    Interactively register a single round: ask and register final active bids for each player, ask and register if there was a reshuffle, ask and register number of tricks won per player.
    showRoundPoints() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Display the intermediate scores of every player.
    showRoundPoints() - Method in class whistapp.ui.PlayGameCLI
    Display the intermediate scores of every player.
    shuffle() - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Deck
    Shuffles the deck.
    shuffleGetTrump() - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Deck
    Shuffles the deck, returns the would be trump suit when dealing this deck.

    Prompt the user for player information and start a new game with the controller.

    Prompt the user to enter player names and start a new game with the controller.

    Start a new game of PlayWhist with the given player names and bot difficulties.

    A method for starting a new round.

    Starts the playing phase of a round
    startPlayingRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for starting the playing phase of the round.
    startPlayingRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A method for starting the playing process of the round.
    startPlayingRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for starting the playing of the new current round.
    submitBid(String, Suit) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for submitting a single bid interactively for the current player.
    submitBid(String, Suit) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A method for submitting a bid for the current player in the current round.
    submitBid(BidType, Suit) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for submitting a bid for the current bidding player.
    Suit - Enum Class in whistapp.domain.cards
    Represents the suit of a card in the game of Whist.
